label: Custom Lab (port 1881)
info: Custom lab simulation with ceiling lights, blinds, shared spotlight, and per-zone radiators+temperature sensors. Start with: node-red --port 1881

name: Initialization
Status
func:
msg.payload = {
    Z1Level:        flow.get('Z1Level'),
    Z2Level:        flow.get('Z2Level'),
    Z1Light:        flow.get('Z1Light'),
    Z2Light:        flow.get('Z2Light'),
    Z1Blinds:       flow.get('Z1Blinds'),
    Z2Blinds:       flow.get('Z2Blinds'),
    Spotlight:      flow.get('Spotlight'),
    Z1Radiator:     flow.get('Z1Radiator'),
    Z2Radiator:     flow.get('Z2Radiator'),
    Z1Temp:         flow.get('Z1Temp'),
    Z2Temp:         flow.get('Z2Temp'),
    Sunshine:       flow.get('Sunshine'),
    TotalEnergyCost:flow.get('TotalEnergyCost'),
    EnergyCost:     flow.get('EnergyCost'),
    Hour:           flow.get('Hour')
};
return msg;

name: Update action
Reset episode
Set state (benchmark)
Update environment
